summary: Added a nix fmt formatter (pkgs.nixfmt) and a devShell (nixfmt, statix, deadnix) to flake.nix, wired non-blocking statix + deadnix reporting into the existing CI job while keeping nix flake check as the sole hard gate, and applied a whole-tree nixfmt pass reformatting 47 of 80 tracked .nix files. All changes staged (not committed, orchestrator_mode=true); nix flake check and an idempotent nixfmt --check both verified green.

artifacts.summary: Added formatter.${system} = pkgs.nixfmt and devShells.${system}.default (nixfmt, statix, deadnix); also reformatted by the Phase 3 nix fmt pass
Added two non-blocking (|| true) statix and deadnix steps after the existing nix flake check step, which remains the sole hard gate
Whole-tree nixfmt format pass (1214 insertions / 926 deletions); verified idempotent via a second nixfmt --check pass
Implementation summary with verification steps and plan deviations (nix fmt symlink/gid workarounds, commit deferred to orchestrator)

completion_data.completion_summary: Added nix fmt formatter (pkgs.nixfmt) and a devShell (nixfmt/statix/deadnix) to flake.nix, wired non-blocking statix+deadnix reporting into CI alongside the existing nix flake check hard gate, and applied a whole-tree nixfmt pass reformatting 47 of 80 .nix files. nix flake check and idempotent nixfmt --check both verified green.

next_steps: Orchestrator should commit the staged changes (flake.nix, .github/workflows/ci.yml, 47 reformatted .nix files, plan/state/TODO updates) and mark task 98 complete.
